name: Smart Budget
description: Track spending, manage budgets, and get financial insights by telling your agent about transactions.
author: ultralight

add.description: Add a transaction (expense or income). Specify amount, category, and optionally a description and date.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to today)

list.description: List transactions, optionally filtered by category, month, or type.

month.description: Month in YYYY-MM format (defaults to current month)

returns.description: List of transactions with net total

summary.description: Get a monthly spending summary broken down by category, with budget warnings.

month.description: Month in YYYY-MM format (defaults to current month)

returns.description: Monthly breakdown by category with totals and budget warnings

budget.description: Set or view budget limits per category. Provide category + limit_amount to set, or call with no args to view all budgets.

limit_amount.description: Monthly spending limit for this category

returns.description: Budget confirmation or list of all budgets

status.description: Quick overview of current month: total spent, income, net, and category count.
